description: Monitoramento de sinal optico, trafego de interfaces e recursos do Switch Criado por Willian Marcheski

options.css:
<style>
  .table-wrapper {
    max-height: 400px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  table.teixi-optica {
    width: auto;
    min-width: 100%;
    border-spacing: 0 4px;
    border-collapse: separate;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #d7faff;
    background: transparent;
  }

  table.teixi-optica thead th {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    color: #6de3ff;
    text-align: center;
    background-color: rgba(18, 32, 46, 0.95);
    border: 1px solid rgba(86, 213, 220, 0.15);
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  }

  table.teixi-optica td {
    padding: 8px 12px;
    text-align: center;
    background-color: rgba(20, 35, 50, 0.5);
    border: 1px solid rgba(86, 213, 220, 0.05);
    border-radius: 5px;
    vertical-align: middle;
    transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
  }

  table.teixi-optica td.transparent {
    background-color: transparent !important;
    border: none !important;
  }

  table.teixi-optica tbody tr:nth-child(even) td {
    background-color: rgba(22, 42, 58, 0.45);
  }

  table.teixi-optica tbody tr:nth-child(odd) td {
    background-color: rgba(13, 26, 38, 0.45);
  }

  table.teixi-optica tbody tr:hover td {
    background-color: rgba(86, 213, 220, 0.1);
  }
</style>

<style>
  .switch-panel {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 12px;
    gap: 14px;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  .switch-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top:20px;
    gap: 12px;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .switch-logo {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
  }

  .switch-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #d7faff;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .legend {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    font-size: 13px;
    
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #d7faff;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .legend span {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .legend-dot {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .dot-up { background-color: #00e676; }
  .dot-down { background-color: #f44336; }
  .dot-unknown { background-color: #9e9e9e; }

  .switch-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(42px, 1fr));
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 12px 7px;
    padding: 30px;
    border-radius: 16px;
    margin-top: 35px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #2e3b45, #1f2a33);
    box-shadow: inset 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  .port-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 2px;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #ffffff;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .port-box {
    aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
    width: 42px;
    border-radius: 6px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #ffffff;
    box-shadow: inset 0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    transition: background 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    cursor: default;
    position: relative;
  }

  .port-box.up {
    background-color: #00e676;
  }

  .port-box.unknown {
    background-color: #9e9e9e;
    opacity: 0.7;
    box-shadow: 0 0 3px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
  }

  .port-box.down {
    background-color: #f44336;
    box-shadow: 0 0 16px #ff5252, 0 0 25px #ff5252;
    animation: blink 2.5s infinite;
  }

  @keyframes blink {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
    50% { opacity: 0.3; }
  }

  .port-box.sfp {
    border: 2px solid #868889;
  }

  .port-box[title]:hover::after {
    content: attr(title);
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -28px;
    background: rgba(18, 32, 46, 0.95);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 4px 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 999;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
</style>
options.html:
Análise de Portas do Switch

UP DOWN DESATIVADO

title: Grafana Labs - HUAWEI
